title: Stupendous Fog And Sky
description: This resource pack adds the Fog and Sky colors from Stupendous Visuals! Also comes with lots of mod support
body:
**Polytone is Required for this resource pack to function**

---

This resource pack simply adds the Fog, Sky, and other colors (birch and water) from the Stupendous Visuals resource pack. Both Stupendous Visuals and **this resource pack** aim to ensure mod compatability with some mods.
